members.name: AddCollisionPolygon
members.summary: Adds a collision polygon to the tile on the given TileSet physics layer.

members.name: AddOccluderPolygon
members.summary: Adds an occlusion polygon to the tile on the TileSet occlusion layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: GetCollisionPolygonOneWayMargin
members.signature: public float GetCollisionPolygonOneWayMargin(int layerId, int polygonIndex)
members.summary: Returns the one-way margin (for one-way platforms) of the polygon at index [param polygon_index] for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: GetCollisionPolygonPoints
members.signature: public PackedVector2Array GetCollisionPolygonPoints(int layerId, int polygonIndex)
members.summary: Returns the points of the polygon at index [param polygon_index] for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: GetCollisionPolygonsCount
members.summary: Returns how many polygons the tile has for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: GetConstantAngularVelocity
members.summary: Returns the constant angular velocity applied to objects colliding with this tile.

members.name: GetConstantLinearVelocity
members.summary: Returns the constant linear velocity applied to objects colliding with this tile.

members.name: GetCustomData
members.summary: Returns the custom data value for custom data layer named [param layer_name]. To check if a custom data layer exists, use [method has_custom_data].

members.name: GetCustomDataByLayerId
members.summary: Returns the custom data value for custom data layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: GetNavigationPolygon
members.signature: public NavigationPolygon GetNavigationPolygon(int layerId, bool flipH, bool flipV, bool transpose)
members.summary: Returns the navigation polygon of the tile for the TileSet navigation layer with index [param layer_id]. [param flip_h], [param flip_v], and [param transpose] allow transforming the returned polygon.

members.name: GetOccluder
members.signature: public OccluderPolygon2D GetOccluder(int layerId, bool flipH, bool flipV, bool transpose)
members.summary: Returns the occluder polygon of the tile for the TileSet occlusion layer with index [param layer_id]. [param flip_h], [param flip_v], and [param transpose] allow transforming the returned polygon.

members.name: GetOccluderPolygon
members.signature: public OccluderPolygon2D GetOccluderPolygon(int layerId, int polygonIndex, bool flipH, bool flipV, bool transpose)
members.summary: Returns the occluder polygon at index [param polygon_index] from the TileSet occlusion layer with index [param layer_id]. The [param flip_h], [param flip_v], and [param transpose] parameters can be [code]true[/code] to transform the returned polygon.

members.name: GetOccluderPolygonsCount
members.summary: Returns the number of occluder polygons of the tile in the TileSet occlusion layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: GetTerrainPeeringBit
members.summary: Returns the tile's terrain bit for the given [param peering_bit] direction. To check that a direction is valid, use [method is_valid_terrain_peering_bit].

members.name: HasCustomData
members.summary: Returns whether there exists a custom data layer named [param layer_name].

members.name: IsCollisionPolygonOneWay
members.signature: public bool IsCollisionPolygonOneWay(int layerId, int polygonIndex)
members.summary: Returns whether one-way collisions are enabled for the polygon at index [param polygon_index] for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: IsValidTerrainPeeringBit
members.summary: Returns whether the given [param peering_bit] direction is valid for this tile.

members.name: RemoveCollisionPolygon
members.signature: public void RemoveCollisionPolygon(int layerId, int polygonIndex)
members.summary: Removes the polygon at index [param polygon_index] for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: RemoveOccluderPolygon
members.signature: public void RemoveOccluderPolygon(int layerId, int polygonIndex)
members.summary: Removes the polygon at index [param polygon_index] for TileSet occlusion layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetCollisionPolygonOneWay
members.signature: public void SetCollisionPolygonOneWay(int layerId, int polygonIndex, bool oneWay)
members.summary: Enables/disables one-way collisions on the polygon at index [param polygon_index] for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetCollisionPolygonOneWayMargin
members.signature: public void SetCollisionPolygonOneWayMargin(int layerId, int polygonIndex, float oneWayMargin)
members.summary: Sets the one-way margin (for one-way platforms) of the polygon at index [param polygon_index] for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetCollisionPolygonPoints
members.signature: public void SetCollisionPolygonPoints(int layerId, int polygonIndex, PackedVector2Array polygon)
members.summary: Sets the points of the polygon at index [param polygon_index] for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetCollisionPolygonsCount
members.signature: public void SetCollisionPolygonsCount(int layerId, int polygonsCount)
members.summary: Sets the polygons count for TileSet physics layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetConstantAngularVelocity
members.signature: public void SetConstantAngularVelocity(int layerId, float velocity)
members.summary: Sets the constant angular velocity. This does not rotate the tile. This angular velocity is applied to objects colliding with this tile.

members.name: SetConstantLinearVelocity
members.signature: public void SetConstantLinearVelocity(int layerId, Vector2 velocity)
members.summary: Sets the constant linear velocity. This does not move the tile. This linear velocity is applied to objects colliding with this tile. This is useful to create conveyor belts.

members.name: SetCustomData
members.signature: public void SetCustomData(String layerName, Variant value)
members.summary: Sets the tile's custom data value for the TileSet custom data layer with name [param layer_name].

members.name: SetCustomDataByLayerId
members.signature: public void SetCustomDataByLayerId(int layerId, Variant value)
members.summary: Sets the tile's custom data value for the TileSet custom data layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetNavigationPolygon
members.signature: public void SetNavigationPolygon(int layerId, NavigationPolygon navigationPolygon)
members.summary: Sets the navigation polygon for the TileSet navigation layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetOccluder
members.signature: public void SetOccluder(int layerId, OccluderPolygon2D occluderPolygon)
members.summary: Sets the occluder for the TileSet occlusion layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetOccluderPolygon
members.signature: public void SetOccluderPolygon(int layerId, int polygonIndex, OccluderPolygon2D polygon)
members.summary: Sets the occluder for polygon with index [param polygon_index] in the TileSet occlusion layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetOccluderPolygonsCount
members.signature: public void SetOccluderPolygonsCount(int layerId, int polygonsCount)
members.summary: Sets the occluder polygon count in the TileSet occlusion layer with index [param layer_id].

members.name: SetTerrainPeeringBit
members.signature: public void SetTerrainPeeringBit(int peeringBit, int terrain)
members.summary: Sets the tile's terrain bit for the given [param peering_bit] direction. To check that a direction is valid, use [method is_valid_terrain_peering_bit].

members.name: FlipH
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the tile will have its texture flipped horizontally.

members.name: FlipV
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the tile will have its texture flipped vertically.

members.name: Material
members.summary: The [Material] to use for this [TileData]. This can be a [CanvasItemMaterial] to use the default shader, or a [ShaderMaterial] to use a custom shader.

members.name: Modulate
members.summary: Color modulation of the tile.

members.name: Probability
members.summary: Relative probability of this tile being selected when drawing a pattern of random tiles.

members.name: Terrain
members.summary: ID of the terrain from the terrain set that the tile uses.

members.name: TerrainSet
members.summary: ID of the terrain set that the tile uses.

members.name: TextureOrigin
members.summary: Offsets the position of where the tile is drawn.

members.name: Transpose
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the tile will display transposed, i.e. with horizontal and vertical texture UVs swapped.

members.name: YSortOrigin
members.summary: Vertical point of the tile used for determining y-sorted order.

members.name: ZIndex
members.summary: Ordering index of this tile, relative to [TileMapLayer].

signals.name: Changed
signals.summary: Emitted when any of the properties are changed.
